title: O Crazy Minnal Lyrics Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom (2012) Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Andrea Jeremaiah
Song: O Crazy Minnal
Lyrics: Karthik Netha

Movie: Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom (2012)
Music: Ved Shankar

O Crazy Minnal, Azhagiya kannil.
Achchangal paravai pola
parandhu pogum vinnil.

Kannaadi kannil, unmugam thaanae
Kanneerai seeni mittai
seidhu vittaai neeye.

Neethaanae kadhal chella ppraani
Nee ponaal vazhai illaithraani

Chill sudarae sudarae yea eeeyae
Nil idarae en manapudhirae
Min-miniyae miniyae yeae eeyae
Yen vazhiye en vazhithunaiye

Idle maavil kolam pottaen
Medical shoppil karuvepilai kaeten
Chockpiece podyil vinmeen paarthaen
Silandhiyin valayil vanavllai kandaen

Adiyil marathadiyil
siru illayaaga irundhaen
Puyalil oru puyalil
ennai nee yaettrinaai

Karayil kadarkarayil, oru suvadaaga irundhaen
Azhayil vellzhayil ennai nee theendinaai
Azhagaaai medhuvaai iyalbaaai

O Crazy Minnal, Azhagiya kannil.
Achchangal paravai pola
parandhu pogum vinnil.

Kannaadi kannil, unmugam thaanae
Kanneerai seeni mittai
seidhu vittaai neeye.

Neethaanae kadhal chella ppraani
Nee ponaal vazhai illaithraani

Aavin paali aanpaal vaasam
Adadaa yeno irul kooda koosum
Kadhal kadhal aahaa mosam
Kaakai yeno kuyil pola pesum

Veyila ? idhu mazhaya ?
idhu rendu ketta nilaya?
Thazhaiva en thazhaiva nee solvaaya ?

Ilayil adhan narambil
orrndhu pogum erumbaai
Uyiril adi uyiril silirthaayae ...

Kalandhaye, niraindhaaye,
Azhagai nee rasithaaye

O Crazy Minnal, Azhagiya kannil.
Achchangal paravai pola
parandhu pogum vinnil.

Kannaadi kannil, unmugam thaanae
Kanneerai seeni mittai
seidhu vittaai neeye.

Neethaanae kadhal chella ppraani
Nee ponaal vazhai illaithraani

Chill sudarae sudarae yea eeeyae
Nil idarae en manapudhirae
Min-miniyae miniyae yeae eeyae
Yen vazhiye en vazhithunaiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'O Crazy Minnal'?

The song expresses the playful and joyful feelings of love, using vivid imagery to convey emotions.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom, the song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the film's light-hearted theme.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah and composed by Ved Shankar.

When was 'O Crazy Minnal' released?

The song was released on July 21, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In O Crazy Minnal, the playful lyrics and upbeat melody create a vibrant atmosphere that resonates with the joy of love. The song captures the essence of romantic moments, making it a delightful experience for listeners. It evokes feelings of happiness and celebration, perfectly aligning with the light-hearted narrative of Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom. This charming track stands out as a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: O Crazy Minnal from the Naduvula Konjam Pakkatha Kanom movie is a delightful blend of romance and joy, beautifully rendered by Andrea Jeremiah. The song captures the essence of love with its catchy melody and playful lyrics, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that brings together heartfelt emotions and vibrant music.
stanzaMeanings: O Crazy Lightning, in beautiful eyes. Like a bird flying in the sky, it soars away.
In the mirror's eyes, is it your face? You are the one who made tears like sweet candy.
You are the one who loves, my dear. Without you, there is no path for me.
Calm down, calm down, oh yes, this is my mind. This is my heart's companion, oh little lightning, oh yes, my path is my guide.
I drew a beautiful design on the ground. I saw a green leaf in the medical shop. I saw a beautiful piece of chocolate in the powder. I saw a bird in the circle of the sky.
I was like a small tree in the roots. In a storm, you caught me in a storm.
In the river, in the dark, I was like a shadow. You pulled me in the beauty of the waves.
O Crazy Lightning, in beautiful eyes. Like a bird flying in the sky, it soars away.
In the mirror's eyes, is it your face? You are the one who made tears like sweet candy.
You are the one who loves, my dear. Without you, there is no path for me.
In the milk of love, there is a darkness that gathers. Love, love, oh how bad it is. Like a crow, it speaks like a cuckoo.
Is this rain in the sun? Is this a bad situation? Will you say my downfall?
In the ground, it is like a worm that goes away. In life, it has become a struggle.
You have mixed, you have filled, you have enjoyed beauty.
O Crazy Lightning, in beautiful eyes. Like a bird flying in the sky, it soars away.
In the mirror's eyes, is it your face? You are the one who made tears like sweet candy.
You are the one who loves, my dear. Without you, there is no path for me.
Calm down, calm down, oh yes, this is my mind. This is my heart's companion, oh little lightning, oh yes, my path is my guide.
